name: Chicken Paprika
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup sour cream OR plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt 1 tablespoon hot margarine over medium heat.
2. Cook the chicken for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
3. Add the soup, sour cream, paprika, and ground red pepper to the skillet. Stir well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then return the chicken to the skillet.
5. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Stir occasionally.
6. Serve with noodles. Serves 4.
